config_template.dtype: {DTYPE} (bfloat16 or float32; bfloat16 path truncates mantissa to emulate SFPSTORE)
config_template.params: none (no scalar parameters; clamp bounds 0.0/1.0 and scale 0.5 are fixed in the kernel)

applicability_notes: hardmish(x) = x * clamp(0.5*x + 1.0, 0, 1) == x * hardsigmoid(x) with PyTorch's hardsigmoid definition relu6(x+3)/6 rescaled; equivalent to x * F.hardsigmoid(x). Fuse when the contiguous subsequence mul(0.5)->add(1.0)->clamp(0,1)->mul(x) (or x * F.hardsigmoid(x)) appears. Numerics: for bfloat16 inputs the device result is computed in fp32 then truncated (not rounded) to bf16; golden emulates this via bit-shift truncation. Validated with PCC 0.9999 and ULP<=1 across all bf16 bit patterns.; ttnn_replacement: output = ttnn.hardmish(input_tensor)
